# Email Sequences & Templates

> Ready-to-use email templates for client acquisition and management.

---

## Cold Outreach Sequence

### Email 1: Initial Contact (Day 1)

**Subject Lines (A/B test):**
- Quick question about [Business Name]'s Google listing
- I found something about [Business Name] on Google Maps
- [Business Name] - noticed something on Google

```
Hi [First Name],

I was searching for [service type] in [city] and came across [Business Name] on Google Maps.

I noticed a few things that might be affecting how often you show up in local searches:

• [Specific issue - e.g., "Your business description is missing"]
• [Specific issue - e.g., "Only 3 photos on your profile"]
• [Specific issue - e.g., "No posts in the last 6 months"]

These are actually quick wins that could help you get more visibility.

Would you be open to a 10-minute call this week? I can walk you through exactly what I found - no sales pitch, just helpful info.

Here's my calendar if that's easier: [Calendar Link]

Best,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Phone]
```

---

### Email 2: Follow-Up + Value (Day 4)

**Subject:** Re: Quick question about [Business Name]'s Google listing

```
Hi [First Name],

Following up on my note from [day]. I know you're busy running [Business Name], so I'll keep this quick.

I actually put together a free audit showing exactly what's affecting your Google Maps visibility:

👉 [Link to their audit results OR attach PDF]

Key findings:
• Your profile scores [X]/100 (industry average is [Y])
• You're missing [specific thing] that competitors have
• Quick fix: [one actionable tip they can do themselves]

Happy to walk through the full report whenever works for you.

Best,
[Your Name]

P.S. - Even if we never work together, that audit has some tips you can implement yourself.
```

---

### Email 3: Social Proof (Day 8)

**Subject:** How [Similar Business] got 40% more calls from Google

```
Hi [First Name],

Last email from me on this, I promise.

I wanted to share a quick story: We recently worked with [Similar Business Type] in [City/Area].

In 3 months, they saw:
• 47% increase in profile views
• 12 new 5-star reviews
• Ranking #1 for "[keyword]" on Google Maps

The starting point? Their profile looked a lot like yours does now.

If you're curious what we did (and whether it could work for [Business Name]), I'm happy to share.

Just reply "interested" and I'll send over the details.

Best,
[Your Name]
```

---

### Email 4: Breakup Email (Day 14)

**Subject:** Should I close your file?

```
Hi [First Name],

I've reached out a few times about optimizing [Business Name]'s Google presence, but haven't heard back.

Totally understand if:
• The timing isn't right
• You're handling it in-house
• It's just not a priority right now

I'll assume that's the case and won't reach out again about this.

But if things change and you want to chat about getting more calls from Google Maps, just reply to this email. My offer for a free walkthrough stands.

Wishing you and [Business Name] all the best,
[Your Name]
```

---

## Lead Response Sequence (After Audit Submission)

### Immediate Auto-Response

**Subject:** Your GBP Audit Results Are Ready 📊

```
Hi [First Name],

Thanks for requesting your free Google Business Profile audit for [Business Name]!

Your results are ready: [Link to results page]

Here's a quick preview:
• Overall Score: [X]/100
• Grade: [Letter Grade]
• Top Issue: [Primary issue found]

I'll be reviewing your results personally and will reach out within 24 hours with some specific recommendations.

In the meantime, feel free to:
• Download your full report
• Reply to this email with any questions
• Schedule a call: [Calendar Link]

Talk soon,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Phone]
```

---

### Follow-Up (Next Business Day)

**Subject:** Reviewed your audit - here's what I'd prioritize

```
Hi [First Name],

I took a closer look at [Business Name]'s Google Business Profile audit and wanted to share my thoughts.

**Your Score: [X]/100**

**The Good:**
• [Something positive about their profile]
• [Another positive thing]

**The Priorities:**
1. [Most important issue] - This is likely costing you visibility
2. [Second issue] - Quick win that could help immediately
3. [Third issue] - Important for long-term growth

**My Recommendation:**
Based on what I see, [Business Name] could benefit most from [specific package or approach].

Would you have 15 minutes this week for a quick call? I can walk through exactly what I'd do in the first 30 days.

Here's my calendar: [Calendar Link]

Or just reply with a good time and I'll make it work.

Best,
[Your Name]
```

## Client Communication Templates

### Welcome Email (After Signing)

**Subject:** Welcome to AP Designs! Here's what happens next

```
Hi [First Name],

Welcome aboard! I'm excited to start working on [Business Name]'s Google presence.

**Here's what happens next:**

📋 **Step 1: Intake Form (Today)**
Please complete this questionnaire so I have everything I need:
[Link to intake wizard or form]

🔑 **Step 2: Grant Access (Within 48 hrs)**
I'll need manager access to your Google Business Profile.
Instructions: [Link to GBP access instructions]

📸 **Step 3: Send Photos (Within 1 week)**
Please send:
• Your logo (high resolution)
• 10-20 photos of your business, team, and work
• Any videos you have

**Timeline:**
• Week 1: Information gathering + access
• Week 2-3: Profile optimization + photos
• Week 4: Citations + first posts
• Month 2+: Ongoing optimization + reporting

**Questions?**
Just reply to this email or call me at [Phone].

Let's get started!

Best,
[Your Name]
```

---

### Monthly Report Delivery

**Subject:** [Month] Report for [Business Name] 📈

```
Hi [First Name],

Your [Month] Google Business Profile report is ready!

**Quick Highlights:**
• Profile Views: [X] ([+/-]% vs last month)
• Customer Actions: [X] calls, [X] website clicks, [X] directions
• New Reviews: [X] (Now at [X] total, [X.X] average rating)

**View Full Report:** [Link or attachment]

**Key Wins This Month:**
• [Specific accomplishment]
• [Another win]

**Focus for Next Month:**
• [Priority 1]
• [Priority 2]

Let me know if you have any questions. I'm happy to schedule a call to walk through everything.

Best,
[Your Name]
```

---

### Requesting Reviews

**Subject:** Quick favor? 🙏

```
Hi [First Name],

Hope [Business Name] is doing great!

Quick ask: Would you mind leaving us a review on Google? It helps us help more businesses like yours.

Just click here: [Your Google Review Link]

Even a sentence or two makes a huge difference.

Thanks so much!
[Your Name]
```

---

### Check-In (No Issues)

**Subject:** Quick check-in on [Business Name]

```
Hi [First Name],

Just wanted to check in and make sure everything is going well with your Google presence.

**Quick Update:**
• Your profile is looking great
• Rankings are [stable/improving]
• [Any specific positive news]

Is there anything you'd like me to focus on or any questions?

Also, if you have any new photos, promotions, or news to share, let me know and I'll get it posted!

Best,
[Your Name]
```

---

### Handling Late Payment

**Subject:** Quick note about your account

```
Hi [First Name],

I hope all is well with you and [Business Name].

I noticed your [month] payment hasn't come through yet. Just wanted to check if there's an issue with the card on file or if you need me to send a new invoice.

Happy to work with you on this - just let me know what works best.

Best,
[Your Name]

P.S. - Everything is still running smoothly on your profile. No interruption to service.
```

---

### Re-Engagement (Lapsed Client)

**Subject:** Miss working with [Business Name]

```
Hi [First Name],

It's been a while since we worked together on [Business Name]'s Google presence.

I was curious - how have things been going? Are you still showing up well in local searches?

If you've been managing it yourself, that's great! But if you've noticed a dip in visibility or just haven't had time to keep up with it, I'd love to help again.

I actually have a new [package/offer] that might be a good fit:
• [Benefit 1]
• [Benefit 2]
• [Benefit 3]

Would you be open to a quick catch-up call?

Best,
[Your Name]
```

## Referral Partner Emails

### Initial Outreach to Partner

**Subject:** Partnership idea - sending you clients?

```
Hi [Partner Name],

I run a local SEO agency specializing in Google Business Profile optimization. I noticed you do [their service - web design, marketing, etc.] for local businesses.

Quick thought: Do your clients ever ask about showing up on Google Maps?

That's what I do, and I'd love to be your go-to referral for GBP work. Here's what I'm thinking:

• You refer clients who need Google Maps help
• I pay you [X]% of the first 3 months (or flat $X per referral)
• Zero work on your end - just make the intro

Interested in chatting for 10 minutes to see if there's a fit?

Best,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
```

---

### Thank You After Referral

**Subject:** Thanks for the [Client Name] referral! 🙏

```
Hi [Partner Name],

Just wanted to say thanks for referring [Client Name] to me. We had a great call and they're signing on for [package]!

Your referral commission of $[X] will be sent out [date/method].

I really appreciate you thinking of me. Please keep them coming - I'll take great care of anyone you send my way.

Best,
[Your Name]

P.S. - Let me know if you need anything from my end. Happy to return the favor!
```

---

## Tips for Email Success

### Subject Line Best Practices
- Keep under 50 characters
- Use their business name when possible
- Ask questions
- Create curiosity, not clickbait
- Test emojis (work for some audiences)

### Body Best Practices
- Short paragraphs (2-3 sentences max)
- Use bullet points for scannability
- One clear CTA per email
- Always include a way to respond
- Sign with your name, not just company

### Timing
- **B2B:** Tuesday-Thursday, 9-11am or 2-4pm
- **Follow-ups:** 3-4 days apart
- **Don't send:** Friday afternoons, weekends, holidays

### Tools
- **Email tracking:** Mailtrack, HubSpot Sales
- **Templates:** Gmail templates, TextExpander
- **Scheduling:** Boomerang, Gmail Schedule Send
- **CRM:** HubSpot, Pipedrive, or simple spreadsheet
